title: Ask for and give recommendations
subtitle: Recommend something simply.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: I recommend this app because it is easy to use.
我推荐这个应用，因为它容易使用。
If you want a quiet place, try the cafe near the library.
如果你想找安静的地方，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。
Can you recommend a good cafe?
你能推荐一家好咖啡馆吗？
Yes, try the cafe near the library.
可以，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。

items.en: I recommend this app because it is easy to use.
items.zh: 我推荐这个应用，因为它容易使用。

items.en: If you want a quiet place, try the cafe near the library.
items.zh: 如果你想找安静的地方，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。

items.en: Can you recommend a good cafe?
items.zh: 你能推荐一家好咖啡馆吗？

items.en: Yes, try the cafe near the library.
items.zh: 可以，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。

items.en: This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you recommend a good cafe?
lines.zh: 你能推荐一家好咖啡馆吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, try the cafe near the library.
lines.zh: 可以，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: If you want a quiet place, try the cafe near the library.
lines.zh: 如果你想找安静的地方，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。

items.en: I recommend this app because it is easy to use.
items.zh: 我推荐这个应用，因为它容易使用。

items.en: If you want a quiet place, try the cafe near the library.
items.zh: 如果你想找安静的地方，试试图书馆旁边的咖啡馆。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
